title: schefflera scandens
intro: Schefflera scandens, also known as the Umbrella Plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Schefflera scandens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
